desc.en: Scandinavia's largest university. Niels Bohr's alma mater. Free tuition for EU.
desc.zh: 北欧最大大学，波尔母校。欧盟学生免学费。

climate.zh: 哥本哈根海洋性气候。夏季凉爽宜人（17-22°C），冬季寒冷多风（0-4°C），冬季日照短。
climate.en: Copenhagen has a maritime climate. Summers cool and pleasant (17-22°C), winters cold and windy (0-4°C) with short daylight.

housing.zh: 校内宿舍约DKK 3500-6000/月（约$500-850）。学生可申请KKIK或私人宿舍。住房紧张，尽早申请。
housing.en: On-campus housing DKK 3500-6000/month (~$500-850). Apply via KKIK or private housing. Housing is tight—apply early.

employment.zh: 北欧就业市场稳定。生物科技、清洁能源、IT领域强势。毕业可获6个月求职签证。
employment.en: Stable Nordic job market. Strong in biotech, clean energy, IT. 6-month post-study job-seeking visa available.

healthcare.zh: 丹麦全民免费医疗。注册CPR号即可享受公立医疗服务。校内有学生健康中心。
healthcare.en: Denmark offers free universal healthcare. Register for CPR number to access public healthcare. Student health center on campus.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请。需高中成绩单、英语能力证明（TOEFL/IELTS）、动机信。部分专业有额外要求。
application.en: Apply via university website. Transcripts, English proficiency (TOEFL/IELTS), motivation letter required. Some programs have additional requirements.

safetyDetail.zh: 哥本哈根非常安全，连续多年被评为全球最宜居城市之一。骑行文化发达，治安良好。
safetyDetail.en: Copenhagen is very safe, consistently ranked among world's most livable cities. Strong cycling culture, good public safety.

desc.en: Denmark's leading engineering university. Pioneer in wind energy research.
desc.zh: 丹麦领先工程大学，风能研究先驱。

climate.zh: 哥本哈根北郊Lyngby，气候同哥本哈根大学。
climate.en: Lyngby north of Copenhagen, climate same as University of Copenhagen.

housing.zh: DTU提供学生宿舍约DKK 3500-5500/月。校园环境优美。
housing.en: DTU offers student housing ~DKK 3500-5500/month. Beautiful campus environment.

employment.zh: 丹麦顶尖理工大学。维斯塔斯（风电）、诺和诺德（制药）等企业紧密合作。
employment.en: Denmark's top tech university. Close partnerships with Vestas (wind energy), Novo Nordisk (pharma).

healthcare.zh: 丹麦全民免费医疗。注册CPR号即可享受。
healthcare.en: Denmark's free universal healthcare. Register for CPR number to access.

application.zh: 通过学校官网申请。需高中成绩、数学/物理基础、英语证明。
application.en: Apply via website. Transcripts, math/physics background, English proficiency required.

safetyDetail.zh: Lyngby是安全的郊区城镇。校园安全良好。
safetyDetail.en: Lyngby is a safe suburban town. Good campus security.
